26:06 â March 03, 2026
Update to the Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725,
as described below.
The Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only.

Status
Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule
2725
Section 1.3, Remoted Deposit Capture Fees
â We reorganized the Corporate Capture fees to improve readability. There are no changes to the actual fees.
Revised
Section 2.5, Electronic Bill Payment Processing and Tracing Fees
We added the âElectronic Bill Payments â Billers with Non-Standard Pricingâ fee. Applicable billers are listed on the Billers with Non-Standard Pricing, Form 10183.
Section 5.1, Currency Fees
We corrected the minimum fee for returning USD notes.
Chapter 7, Origination Solutions Fees
We removed this section.
Section 9.1, Legacy APIs â Operating Fees
We corrected the Deposit Anywhere API fees, as they must match the Mobile Remote Deposit Capture fees in Section 1.3, Remote Deposit Capture Fees. They are the same fee.
